data_sources.state_gdp_per_capita: MoSPI State GDP estimates 2022-23, current prices
data_sources.state_informal_economy_share: NSSO PLFS 2022-23, estimated share of informal employment in Tamil Nadu
data_sources.ruling_party_trust_index: Estimated from Lokniti-CSDS post-2021 Tamil Nadu election survey; DMK government satisfaction index
data_sources.political_contestation_index: ECI 2021 and 2024 data; 0.68 reflects strong single-party periods typical of Dravidian politics (DMK vs AIADMK alternation)
data_sources.language_network_multiplier: 1.3 as specified in AGENT_SPEC.md; reflects strong Tamil-language media ecosystem (Sun TV Network, Kalaignar TV, Tamil print ecosystem) accelerating information diffusion within Tamil-speaking networks
data_sources.media_penetration: BARC India 2023 (tv: highest Tamil TV penetration), IRS 2022 (print: strong Tamil dailies like Dinamalar, Dinakaran), IAMAI-Kantar 2023 (digital), RAM Ratings 2022 (radio)
data_sources.union_legal_framework: Tamil Nadu labour framework assessed as moderate; active union culture but within institutional channels
data_sources.examination_board: Both Tamil Nadu State Board (TNBSE) and CBSE operate; state board is dominant with higher enrollment share
